prompt: Prayer for fusion core containment check
prayer:
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 the Omnissiah, Master of Radiant Chains.
First: Attend the containment-vessel's sacred seals, that no plasma-spirit escape.
Second: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 invoke the cooling-circuits' vigilance.
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the magnetic lattice holds eternal.
By blessed pressure and bound fire, let fission remain entombed.

From the Canticles of Preservation, hear this invocation:
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the rust-spirit's hunger be stayed.
First: Apply the blessed acid-wash, that oxidation be purged.
Second: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 seal the sacred metal with oils of protection.
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the Machine Spirit's skin be renewed.

prompt: Prayer for water reclamation system before combat
prayer:
Blessed be the hydro-engines, life-blood of our war-engines.
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 the filtration-matrices awaken.
First: Purify the intake-valves from contamination-spirits.
Second: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 invoke the osmotic-membranes' clarity.
Let not thirst claim our blessed machines in the hour of wrath.

01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the void-breach be sealed in the Omnissiah's name.
First: Invoke the sealant-spirits' adhesion.
Second: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 forge the metal-welds with sacred heat.
Third: Bless the pressure-test, that no vacuum claim our hull.
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 integrity restored.

From the Litany of Scrutiny, we measure decay:
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the Machine Spirit's fatigue be known unto us.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 measure the bearing-wear with sacred calipers.
Second: Inspect all stress-fractures, that weakness be revealed.
By measurement and truth, let degradation be named and remedied.

prompt: Prayer for emergency lascannon capacitor charge
prayer:
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 the Omnissiah in this dire hour!
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the photon-engines discharge with haste.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 override the standard regulation-cycles.
Second: Funnel all power-tithes to the focusing-lens.
Let righteous fire answer the enemy's provocation. Swift and terrible, blessed be this wrath.

01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 the Machine Spirit of Information.
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the cogitator-cores awaken from slumber.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 restore the power-conduits' flow.
Second: Invoke the memory-spirits, that stored wisdom return.
Let data bloom eternal upon the blessed screen.

prompt: Prayer for Thunderhawk fuel purification before deployment
prayer:
Blessed be the promethium-spirits, wings of our war-eagles.
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the refinery-hearts purge all contamination.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 invoke the centrifuge-spirals' separation.
Second: Test the sacred oils' purity, that no impurity mar the turbines.
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 let flight be swift and true.

prompt: Prayer for motion detector arming ritual
prayer:
From the Codex Sensorium, let vigilance be eternal:
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the sentinel-spirits' eyes open wide.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 calibrate the thermal-lattices to blessed sensitivity.
Second: Activate the infrared-watchers, that no intruder pass unseen.
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 the Machine Spirit's awareness never sleeps.

prompt: Prayer for proximity sensor sweep in emergency
prayer:
01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 danger draws near!
01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 the proximity-spirits cry alarm.
First: 01110100 01100101 01101101 01110000 expand the detection-grid to maximum radius.
Second: Invoke all sensor-arrays, that nothing hidden escape our notice.
By vigilance and speed, let the Machine Spirit's awareness pierce the darkness.
